raw.advertiser_name: Devil May Cry: Peak of Combat

hook.summary: Close-up of a cybernetic eye followed by a girl talking to an astronaut.
hook.visual_action: Extreme close-up of a girl's eye with a glowing blue digital iris, then a cut to her standing next to a character in a space suit.

scene_flow: Close-up of a girl's digital eye and interaction with a space-suited character.
Action sequence showing the girl and the character fighting a large robotic enemy.
Gameplay footage showing third-person shooting and hacking mechanics.
Final end card with release date, pre-order info, and platform logos.
on_screen_text: PIRATEZ ET TIREZ POUR RETOURNER SUR TERRE !
audience_proxy: Hardcore sci-fi action fans who appreciate high-fidelity cinematic storytelling and third-person combat.
